headline: Assessing Whether PayPal (PYPL) Looks Undervalued After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: PayPal Holdings stock in focus PayPal Holdings (PYPL) is drawing fresh attention after a mixed return profile, with a roughly 11% gain over the past month in contrast to weaker moves over the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for PayPal Holdings. The recent 10.67% 1 month share price return stands in contrast to a 24.98% 3 month share price decline and a 35.96% 1 year total shareholder return loss. This suggests momentum is rebuilding after a tougher stretch for longer...
